Individual Measure to Strengthen the Response Capacity to Manage Migration Flows in Bosnia and Herzegovina; MOVEMENT, EMERGENCY AND POST-CRISIS MIGRATION MANAGEMENT; Individual measure to strengthen the response capacity to manage migration flows in Bosnia and Herzegovina for the period of 01 April to 31 December 2023

Individual Measure to Strengthen the Response Capacity to Manage Migration Flows in Bosnia and Herzegovina; MOVEMENT, EMERGENCY AND POST-CRISIS MIGRATION MANAGEMENT; This Agreement refers to the activities that will be carried out within the project entitled ‘’Individual measure to strengthen the response capacity to manage migration flows in Bosnia and Herzegovina’’ (hereinafter referred to as the ‘’Project’’), which is financed by the European Union (‘’Donor’’) in accordance with the Financing Agreement No. IPA/2022/435-616 (hereinafter ‘’EU Agreement’’).  The general goal of the Project is to provide support to the institutions of Bosnia and Herzegovina (BiH) in the areas of migration, reception and border management in the context of the number of migrants, asylum seekers and refugees who have been passing through the country since the end of 2017.  This long-term approach is in accordance with the Commission’s Opinion on BiH’s application for membership in the European Union, Key Priority No. 8, which calls for ‘’ensuring effective coordination, at all levels, of border management capacity and migration management capacity, as well as ensuring the functioning of the asylum system.’’  The activities proposed by IOM under the Donor-funded Project are designed to respond to the basic needs of migrants, depending on the type of assistance, by providing support to government institutions to maintain or improve their response to the refugee and migrant situation, by providing assistance in state-run facilities, in temporary reception centers, and beyond.  Goals will be achieved by strengthening the role of the Ministy in coordination and management of migration, in accordance with the legal competencies of the Ministry.
